data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements robust distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attack protection mechanisms.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and other proprietary tools are used to mitigate attack impacts.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Uses encryption for both data at rest and data in transit to ensure security.
data.technical_spec: Supports protocols like TLS for secure data transmission and AES-256 for storage encryption.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Employs strong authentication mechanisms to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports multi-factor authentication (MFA) and OAuth tokens.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS)
data.description: Utilizes advanced IDS to monitor and detect potential threats in the network.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AWS GuardDuty and third-party solutions for comprehensive monitoring.

data.title: Security Audits and Compliance
data.description: Regularly conducts security audits and complies with international standards.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to standards such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, and PCI DSS.
